column2: Be free from spend-based emission factors.

Open PCF users agree to prominently include the attribution “PCFs by Terralytiq” (a) wherever Scope 3 emissions calculations are generated, including Emissions Reports and excerpts; (b) on users marketing sites where emission factors are mentioned; and (c) on any part of users’s platform, such as websites, web portals, or other applications where Scope 3 calculations are generated.

Questions: for inquiries about Terralytiq commercials or requests for additional data features such as data adjusted with supplier primary data or production method, breakdown by tiers of the supply chain, or by CBAM emissions, please reach out to contact@terralytiq.com for more information.
